parameters.subject: =Official Job Offer: {{ $json.body.jobTitle }} at {{ $json.body.companyName }}
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $json.body.candidateName }},

Congratulations! On behalf of {{ $json.body.companyName }}, we are thrilled to offer you the position of {{ $json.body.jobTitle }}.

We were incredibly impressed by your interviews and background, and we believe you will be a fantastic addition to our team.

Our HR team will follow up shortly with details regarding compensation, benefits, and start date documentation.

Welcome aboard!

Best regards,
The {{ $json.body.companyName }} Recruitment Team
